arguments.intent: Searching for information about the nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b model

result.detailedContent: Searching for information about the nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b model

result.content:
{"type":"output_text","text":{"value":"The **NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B** is a state-of-the-art open large language model (LLM) released in March 2026, designed for advanced agentic reasoning, coding, long-context tasks, and high-volume workflows (e.g., IT ticket automation, tool use, and retrieval-augmented generation). Here’s a detailed description of its features and architecture:

---

### Architecture
- **Hybrid Model**: Combines Mamba-2 (for linear-time sequence processing), Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), and select Attention layers.
- **LatentMoE**: Novel MoE variant that compresses each token's representation before expert routing; allows 512 experts with top-22 routing at the compute cost of a much smaller model.
- **Multi-Token Prediction (MTP)**: Enables the model to generate several tokens per forward pass, improving speed and efficiency.
- **Parameter Size**: 120B total parameters, with only 12B active per inference pass for improved compute efficiency.
- **Context Length**: Natively supports up to 1 million tokens — among the longest context windows available, ensuring memory retention over very long tasks【3:6†source】【3:7†source】【3:8†source】.

### Training and Data
- **Pre-training Corpus**: Trained on 25 trillion tokens, including high-quality curated and synthetic text in 20+ natural languages and 43 programming languages.
- **Data Freshness**: Pre-training cutoff is June 2025, and post-training data includes updates to February 2026【3:6†source】.
- **Precision**: Trained in NVFP4 precision (native 4-bit floating point), enhancing efficiency.

### Performance & Use Cases
- **Throughput**: Achieves up to 2.2–7.5x higher throughput than comparable models; outputs up to 442 tokens/second depending on provider/hardware.
- **Reasoning Mode**: Can be enabled/disabled or tuned for full, low-effort, or off, tailoring performance for complex or simple requests.
- **Benchmarks**: Scores competitively with top models like Qwen3.5-122B and GPT-OSS-120B on agentic and general knowledge tasks【3:5†source】.
- **Best For**: Agentic workflows, collaborative agents, software development, cybersecurity, long-form research, tool calling, long-context summarization, and IT automation【3:9†source】.

### Supported Languages
- English, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Spanish, Chinese
- 43 programming languages

### Deployment
- **Hardware Requirements**: Minimum single NVIDIA B200 GPU (NVFP4), 2x H100 (FP8), or 4x A100 (BF16) for different variants.
- **Licensing**: Open weights, datasets, and recipes under the NVIDIA Nemotron Open Model License permitting commercial use (compliance with safety guardrails required).

### API & Pricing (as of 2026)
- **Provider Inference Pricing**: Around $0.20–$0.75 per million tokens, depending on the platform.
- **API Features**: Reasoning traces, tool calls, JSON output, streaming responses, and more.

---

**Summary:**  
Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B is a highly efficient, large-scale open-weight LLM purpose-built for agentic, reasoning-intensive workflows and massive context windows. It brings together innovative architecture (Mamba, MoE, MTP), high-quality multilingual/data training, and unmatched compute efficiency, setting a new standard for open-source LLMs in 2026【3:0†source】【3:3†source】【3:6†source】【3:7†source】【3:8†source】【3:9†source】.","annotations":[{"text":"","start_index":1100,"end_index":1112,"url_citation":{"title":"Nvidia’s Open Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Model Sets New Paces In Its Class","url":"https://www.deeplearning.ai/the-batch/nvidias-open-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-model-sets-new-paces-in-its-class/"}},{"text":"","start_index":1112,"end_index":1124,"url_citation":{"title":"NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B API Benchmarks: Latency & Cost","url":"https://deepinfra.com/blog/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-api-benchmarks"}},{"text":"","start_index":1124,"end_index":1136,"url_citation":{"title":"NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B API - Qubrid AI","url":"https://www.qubrid.com/models/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b"}},{"text":"","start_index":1436,"end_index":1448,"url_citation":{"title":"Nvidia’s Open Nemotron 3 Super 120B-A12B Model Sets New Paces In Its Class","url":"https://www.deeplearning.ai/the-batch/nvidias-open-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b-model-sets-new-paces-in-its-class/"}},{"text":"","start_index":1991,"end_index":2003,"url_citation":{"title":"nvidia / nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b","url":"https://docs.api.nvidia.com/nim/reference/nvidia-nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b"}},{"text":"","start_index":2178,"end_index":2190,"url_citation":{"title":"NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super (120B MoE) | Guides | Clore.ai","url":"https://docs.clore.ai/guides/language-models/nvidia-nemotron-3-super"}},{"text":"","start_index":3218,"end_index":3230,"url_citation":{"title":"nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b Model by NVIDIA | NVIDIA NIM","url":"https://build.nvidia.com/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b/modelcard"}},{"text":"","start_index":3230,"end_index":3242,"url_citation":{"title":"nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B - arguments.command:
cat > artifacts/4359762793/result.md << 'EOF'
# nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b 的作用

NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B 是一個於 2026 年 3 月發佈的開放大型語言模型（LLM），主要設計用於：

- **代理式推理（Agentic Reasoning）**：能夠執行複雜的多步驟決策與工具使用，適合自動化工作流程（例如 IT 票據處理、檢索增強生成等）。
- **編程與程式碼生成**：支援 43 種程式語言，適用於程式輔助開發、除錯與重構。
- **長上下文處理**：原生支援最高 100 萬 token 的上下文窗口，適合長文件摘要、深度研究與大規模資料分析。
- **高效能與低運算成本**：採用混合 Mamba-2、Mixture‑of‑Experts（LatentMoE）與 Multi‑Token Prediction 架構，僅需約 12B 有效參數即可發揮 120B 模型的能力，提升吞吐量並降低硬體需求。
- **多語言支援**：包含英文、法文、德文、意大利文、日文、西班牙文、中文等多種自然語言。
- **開放授權**：模型權重、訓練資料與食譜採用 NVIDIA Nemotron 開放模型授權，允許商業使用（需遵守安全防護）。

總結來說，該模型專注於提供高效、長上下文且具備工具使用能力的語言模型，適用於需要代理行為、大量文字處理及程式開發的場景。
EOF

# nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b 的作用

NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B 是一個於 2026 年 3 月發佈的開放大型語言模型（LLM），主要設計用於：

- **代理式推理（Agentic Reasoning）**：能夠執行複雜的多步驟決策與工具使用，適合自動化工作流程（例如 IT 票據處理、檢索增強生成等）。
- **編程與程式碼生成**：支援 43 種程式語言，適用於程式輔助開發、除錯與重構。
- **長上下文處理**：原生支援最高 100 萬 token 的上下文窗口，適合長文件摘要、深度研究與大規模資料分析。
- **高效能與低運算成本**：採用混合 Mamba-2、Mixture‑of‑Experts（LatentMoE）與 Multi‑Token Prediction 架構，僅需約 12B 有效參數即可發揮 120B 模型的能力，提升吞吐量並降低硬體需求。
- **多語言支援**：包含英文、法文、德文、意大利文、日文、西班牙文、中文等多種自然語言。
- **開放授權**：模型權重、訓練資料與食譜採用 NVIDIA Nemotron 開放模型授權，允許商業使用（需遵守安全防護）。

總結來說，該模型專注於提供高效、長上下文且具備工具使用能力的語言模型，適用於需要代理行為、大量文字處理及程式開發的場景。

data.content:
已將關於 **nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b** 的作用說明寫入 `artifacts/4359762793/result.md`。

檔案內容摘要：
- 模型定位：開放大型語言模型，專長於代理式推理、編程、長上下文處理（最高 1M token）以及高效能低運算成本。
- 架構：混合 Mamba‑2、LatentMoE 與 Multi‑Token Prediction，僅需約 12B 有效參數即可發揮 120B 效能。
- 用途：適用於自動化工作流程（如 IT 票據處理、檢索增強生成）、程式輔助開發、長文摘要與深度研究等場景。
- 支援語言：多種自然語言與 43 種程式語言，並採用開放授權允許商業使用。

完整內容請參閱 `artifacts/4359762793/result.md`。任務完成。
